title: syngramma coriacea
intro: Syngramma coriacea, also known as the leathery sword fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions in Africa, Asia, and the Pacific. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Syngramma coriacea include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Syngramma coriacea can be made by infusing the leaves in water or by using the plant in a decoction, which is then used to treat various health conditions.
